emails.cadenceName: US|Select|Infrastructure|Head of IT|Outbound|Fusion|FY26
emails.subject: Goldman Sachs: VMware alternative assessment
emails.body:
Hi Sarah,

Given the recent VMware licensing changes, many IT leaders are evaluating alternatives.

IBM Fusion offers:
• 50% lower TCO vs. VMware
• Native OpenShift integration
• Enterprise-grade reliability (99.99% uptime)

Would you be interested in seeing how this applies to Goldman Sachs?

Best regards,
John Smith
IBM Infrastructure
emails.additionalContext: Recent Broadcom acquisition of VMware causing cost concerns

emails.cadenceName: US|Select|Infrastructure|Head of IT|Outbound|Fusion|FY26
emails.subject: Case study: Financial Services infrastructure transformation
emails.body:
Hi Sarah,

I wanted to share a recent case study from a Financial Services company that migrated from VMware to IBM Fusion:

• Completed migration in 4 months
• 50% cost reduction
• Improved application performance by 35%
• Zero downtime

Would you like to see the full case study?

Best regards,
John Smith

emails.cadenceName: US|Select|Infrastructure|Outbound|IBM i DR|PowerVS
emails.subject: IBM i disaster recovery in the cloud
emails.body:
Hi Jennifer,

Many IBM i shops are moving disaster recovery to the cloud for better RPO/RTO and lower costs.

IBM PowerVS offers:
• Native IBM i support
• Sub-hour recovery times
• 60% lower DR costs
• No re-platforming required

Would you like to discuss Sysco's IBM i DR strategy?

Best regards,
David Park
IBM Cloud
emails.additionalContext: Recent ransomware concerns in distribution sector

emails.cadenceName: US | Select | Infrastructure | IT Leaders & Architects | Flash Availability | US | FY26
emails.subject: 99.9999% availability for Morgan Stanley
emails.body:
Hi Robert,

Downtime costs Financial Markets companies an average of $300K per hour. IBM FlashSystem delivers 99.9999% availability - that's less than 32 seconds of downtime per year.

Key capabilities:
• Active-active replication
• Non-disruptive upgrades
• Cyber vault protection

Would you like to discuss Morgan Stanley's availability requirements?

Best regards,
Lisa Chen
IBM Storage

emails.cadenceName: US|Select|Infrastructure|Outbound|Client-Intro
emails.subject: Quick introduction - IBM Infrastructure Solutions
emails.body:
Hi Thomas,

I hope this email finds you well. I'm reaching out because Delta Airlines is on our radar as a leader in Travel & Transportation.

Many infrastructure leaders are currently evaluating their VMware strategy given recent licensing changes. I'd love to share how IBM Fusion has helped similar organizations reduce costs by 50% while improving performance.

Would you be open to a brief 15-minute conversation?

Best regards,
Sarah Martinez
IBM Infrastructure

emails.cadenceName: US|Select|Infrastructure|Outbound|Client-Intro
emails.subject: Following up: Delta Airlines infrastructure strategy
emails.body:
Hi Thomas,

I wanted to follow up on my previous email about infrastructure modernization.

I recently worked with a Travel & Transportation company similar to Delta Airlines that achieved:
• 50% reduction in infrastructure costs
• 40% faster deployment times
• Zero downtime during migration

Would you have 15 minutes this week to discuss your infrastructure priorities?

Best regards,
Sarah Martinez
